```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
repeat {
  a <- sample(2:8,1); k <- sample(1:5,1); ans <- a*(k+1)/(k+2)
  vals <- round(c(ans,a/2,a*(k+2)/(k+1),(k+1)/(k+2),a/(k+2)),4)
  if (length(unique(vals)) == 5L) break
}
opts <- sprintf("$%.4f$",vals)
```

Question
========
Se $f(x)=(`r k+1`)x^{`r k`}/`r a^(k+1)` para $0<x<`r a`$, qual é $E(X)$?

Answerlist
----------
* `r opts[1]`
* `r opts[2]`
* `r opts[3]`
* `r opts[4]`
* `r opts[5]`

Solution
========
$$E(X)=\int_0^{`r a`}x\frac{(`r k+1`)x^{`r k`}}{`r a^(k+1)`}dx
=`r a`\frac{`r k+1`}{`r k+2`}
=`r sprintf("%.4f",ans)`.$$

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap1S8Q2_esperanca_continua
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10000
exshuffle: TRUE
